stemHtml:
Given the following information, calculate the Average Groundspeed during the climb from an aerodrome with elevation of 3000 ft to a Top of Climb at FL200:

Temperature: ISA conditions
Surface W/V at 3000 ft: 220/15kt
W/V at FL80: 240º/35 kt
W/V at FL140: 260º/45kt
W/V at FL200: 280º/115 kt
Average TAS: 150 kt
Average Track: 300ºT
